remarks: This one-bedroom, one bathroom sanctuary offers a birds-eye view over downtown Stamford while supplying peace and quiet in a luxury building. Enter to a secure reception area with security and high-end lobby. Take the elevator to your home on the 12th floor or stop on the fourth floor for a work-out in the large and well-equipped gym and clubhouse which includes a kitchen. Once inside your home enjoy the large picture windows allowing for spectacular light exposure. Clean, well-appointed condo convenient to the heart of Stamford. Parking available for a monthly fee.
